series_metadata.series_description: Record series consists of a form letter sent to record owners requesting approval for the destruction of records stored in the ODPS Record Center, lists of records to be destroyed, and responses from record owners.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 10 years after disposal of records. ; Electronic: Information is maintained in the Inventory Management System (BIMS) for 10 years after disposal of records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
